title: holosteum glutinosum
intro: Holosteum glutinosum, also known as sticky chickweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Holosteum glutinosum include its ability to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Holosteum glutinosum can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to soothe and calm the skin.
